span.p: Does the prospect's trade-lane profile match our network strengths?

span.p: Deprioritize - add to long-list for future network expansion

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is there a known trigger event in the last 90 days?

span.p: High priority - lead with trigger event in outreach
